option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/mainShellRoot" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#FBFCFE" android:orientation="vertical">
<androidx.fragment.app.FragmentContainerView android:id="@+id/mainContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="620dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottomNav" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="64dp" android:background="#F8FAFD" android:elevation="10dp" android:paddingTop="4dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp" app:itemBackground="@drawable/bg_bottom_nav_item" app:itemHorizontalTranslationEnabled="false" app:itemIconSize="22dp" app:itemIconTint="@color/bottom_nav_item_color" app:itemPaddingBottom="4dp" app:itemPaddingTop="6dp" app:itemRippleColor="@android:color/transparent" app:itemTextAppearanceActive="@style/TextAppearance.Experiment.BottomNav.Active" app:itemTextAppearanceInactive="@style/TextAppearance.Experiment.BottomNav.Inactive" app:itemTextColor="@color/bottom_nav_item_color" app:labelVisibilityMode="labeled" app:menu="@menu/menu_main_bottom_nav" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/mainShellRoot" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#FBFCFE" android:orientation="vertical" android:weightSum="100">
<androidx.fragment.app.FragmentContainerView android:id="@+id/mainContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="85" />
<com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottomNav" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="15" android:minHeight="64dp" android:background="#F8FAFD" android:elevation="10dp" android:paddingTop="4dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp" app:itemBackground="@drawable/bg_bottom_nav_item" app:itemHorizontalTranslationEnabled="false" app:itemIconSize="22dp" app:itemIconTint="@color/bottom_nav_item_color" app:itemPaddingBottom="4dp" app:itemPaddingTop="6dp" app:itemRippleColor="@android:color/transparent" app:itemTextAppearanceActive="@style/TextAppearance.Experiment.BottomNav.Active" app:itemTextAppearanceInactive="@style/TextAppearance.Experiment.BottomNav.Inactive" app:itemTextColor="@color/bottom_nav_item_color" app:labelVisibilityMode="labeled" app:menu="@menu/menu_main_bottom_nav" /> </LinearLayout>
